highlights.description: Structured lint remediation database mapping golangci-lint rules to fix strategies
Nolint comment generators with pre-written reason strings for common scenarios

added.description: Remediation database with support for gosec, staticcheck, and errcheck rules
`LoadRemediations()` and `MustLoadRemediations()` functions to load embedded database
`RuleFix.HasHelper()` method to check if a code-based helper function exists
`gosec.Nolint()` generic function for generating nolint:gosec comments
`gosec.CommonReasons` struct with pre-written reason strings for OAuth, shutdown handlers, SSRF, etc.
JSON schema for remediation database with type, summary, pattern, package, function, example fields

documentation.description: Package documentation with usage examples for database queries and nolint generation
README with installation, usage examples, and supported linters reference
